svg.aria-label: Tech Security Weekly Digest March 06 2026: Cisco SD-WAN CVE-2026-20122 active exploit, Tycoon 2FA PhaaS takedown, GPT-5.4 launch
svg.title: Cisco SD-WAN CVE, Tycoon 2FA takedown, GPT-5.4
svg.text: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager — arbitrary file overwrite
Authenticated attacker overwrites arbitrary files across
entire SD-WAN fabric. Emergency patch required.
Europol-led op — AitM bypasses MFA at scale
Native computer use · 1M token context window
